name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
❤️❤️Lady D-Joy Ultra-Mini Embroidery Lens Blue Bead, lined with sheep tendon, highlighting the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, fully embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from leather, paired with light gold-finished metal D.I.O.R. charm to elevate the style. With detachable chain strap and adjustable, detachable leather strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, an ideal choice for daily or evening looks. Dimensions: 16 x 9 x 5 cm
